[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00010011 3
1 10110101 5
2 11100000 3
3 10100010 3
4 10011111 6
5 10110000 3
6 01101100 4
7 00010011 3

01 10 01100100 3
12 21 00000000 a
23 32 00010001 2
34 43 10100000 2

56 65 10000010 2
67 76 10010101 4
70 07 01000101 3

02 20 00000001 1
13 31 00100100 2
24 42 00000000 a
35 53 10100000 2
46 64 10000000 1
57 75 10000000 1
60 06 00000101 2
71 17 01000100 2

03 30 00100101 3

25 52 00000010 1
36 63 10010101 4
47 74 11000000 2
50 05 00100000 1
61 16 00001100 2
72 27 00010001 2

04 40 01100000 2

26 62 00010011 3 match 0 7
37 73 10010101 4
